svg.text:
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ R-CNN FAMILY EVOLUTION │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
R-CNN (2014) Fast R-CNN (2015) Faster R-CNN (2015) ──────────── ───────────────── ──────────────────
Image Image Image │ │ │ ▼ ▼ ▼ Selective Search CNN Feature CNN Feature (~2000 regions) Extraction Extraction │ │ │ ▼ ▼ ▼ CNN per region RoI Pooling Region Proposal (very slow!) (share features) Network (RPN) │ │ │ ▼ ▼ ▼ SVM + Regressor FC Layers RoI Pooling (classify + bbox) │ ▼ FC Layers
Speed: 47s/image Speed: 2s/image Speed: 0.2s/image
